## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new employees and provide an overview of company operations, policies, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Unlimited PTO policy with emphasis on responsible communication and planning](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Robust referral program offering significant bonuses (e.g., $10k for engineers)](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Ongoing improvements to onboarding, async communication, and performance management](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Freedom and responsibility culture, inspired by Netflix, applied to various HR policies](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)

## Topics

### Tools and Access

  - [Notion page lists required tools; to be role-specific in future](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Shared accounts (e.g., SEMrush) accessed via 1Password](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Company credit card preferred for work-related expenses](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Action item: New hires to review tool list and request missing access](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

### PTO and Work Hours

  - [Unlimited PTO with focus on responsible communication](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Best practice: Add calendar invites for team visibility on time off](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Non-US employees encouraged to observe local holidays](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Overlap with PST hours emphasized for efficient communication](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

### Referral Program

  - [Significant bonuses offered (e.g., $10k for engineers after 6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Submit referrals via Notion form, even for roles not officially open](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Niche expertise (e.g., healthcare writers) welcomed](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Upcoming Initiatives

  - [Async communication improvements (e.g., Loom-like tools)](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Enhanced onboarding via Deal Engage platform](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Formal expense policy development](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Performance management system implementation](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

### Onboarding Improvements

  - [Current onboarding process acknowledged as basic](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Plans to create role-specific onboarding checklists](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Encouragement for new hires to contribute to onboarding materials](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Suggestion: Record Loom videos for common processes and tools](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

### Organizational Structure

  - [Org chart in development, to be available within two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)
  - [Bridget's team covers operations, including recruiting, finance, and people ops](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

## Next Steps

  - [New hires: Review tool list in Notion and request any missing access](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Contribute ideas for async communication tools to Yusef (IT contact)](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Share onboarding improvement suggestions with Kyle or Bridget](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Consider creating documentation for processes learned during onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Review referral program details in Notion and submit any potential candidates](https://fathom.video/share/NZN_styn3y9_sRwqDdtLfXEJ14t8dzYn?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
